product.title: Official Legacera Foundation for Mature Skin, 4-in-1 Foundation - Longwear Match, Hydrating Full Coverage, Long-Lasting & Waterproof, for all Skin Types
featureBullets: Color Changing Liquid Foundation: Intelligent Toning Technology - Unique innovative formula automatically adapts to different skin tones, creating seamless, natural coverage without mismatched tones. Provides a personalized, natural look.
Lightweight and hydrating: Enriched with moisturizing ingredients, it ensures your skin stays hydrated all day long, preventing dryness and peeling.
Long-lasting and durable: This color changing liquid foundation is perfect for our skin and stays for hours, resisting sweat and oil, giving you a fresh and flawless makeup all day long.

Perfect Concealment: Our color changing foundation uses an excellent innovative formula that does not feel heavy when applied, providing you with excellent concealing effect, making your skin look radiant, youthful and energetic.
Easy to apply: The color changing foundation has a smooth texture and is easy to blend. Perfect for daily use and special occasions. And all skin types.
product.description: Specifications: Weight: 95g Packing size: 38*38*120mm/1.50*1.50*4.72in Package includes: 1/2pcs * Foundation Note: 1. Due to manual measurement, please allow an error of 0-1cm. Please make sure you don’t mind before bidding. 2. Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thank you!

specification.value: #25,223 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #242 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers have mixed opinions about the foundation's coverage, with some reporting barely any coverage. The color match also receives mixed feedback, with some customers saying it looks amazing all day while others note it doesn't adapt well to their skin tone.

reviews.reviewText: Very disappointed. Item shipped was not as described in any way. Product box and product container not labeled as Legacera. Container didn’t look like product pictured. I wanted to give it a chance. Product itself looked like a watered down, light colored foundation that did not provide even light coverage or change to match my skin tone as advertised. Saw no difference than any other liquid foundation I have used. I immediately returned it. Definitely do not recommend. Buyer beware.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 14, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Love that it is not greas
reviews.reviewText: It is not greasy and it match my complexion
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 17, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It does adjust to your own skin color and it looks natural.. but you have to use more to have a more polished look. It's not a heavy product but it requires a few layers.. It's nice for everyday
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 23, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Feels good on face but not much change. This is not a full coverage makeup this does settle in lines and wrinkles I was really hopeful this product said for mature skin but I don’t see how. I am very disappointed
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 3, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: This is not a full coverage or lasting foundation.
reviews.reviewText: Definitely not a product for me. I tried it a couple times. I wore to work, by the end of the evening I look like death warmed over. Like I had no makeup on it all. I am not pleased at all. Not the product that was expecting at all.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 20, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I had always used drugstore foundation. Ugh.. the creases, and didn’t cover dark circles. This foundation gives me a gorgeous glow. It absolutely does not settle in and crease. It looks truly amazing all day.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 7, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Foundation is not what your getting
reviews.reviewText: This is pretty much a water down lotion with some color. Does not adapt to your skin color and has no coverage. Would not buy again
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 18, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Didn't match my skin color wasn't even a natural look. Bottle that was sent to me didn't even look as the advertisement it only said sunscreen serum. A waste of my money very unhappy
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 26, 2026
